title: Ipoh 3D2N: hot springs, rafting & hidden eats
summary: A complete KL round-trip reconstruction of 小霈霈奇遇记's real three-day post. Jalan2 gets the traveler to Ipoh by KTM ETS or EasyBook coach, opens Grab with the exact next-stop pin for normal road legs, keeps a three-day driver as an optional alternative, preserves the source-observed walking, park shuttle and rafting lorry transfers, then returns the traveler to Kuala Lumpur.

stops.name: Kuala Lumpur to Ipoh
stops.summary: Start in Kuala Lumpur and choose KTM ETS or an EasyBook coach to Ipoh. Jalan2 then opens Grab to the first stop from the confirmed arrival terminal; a driver pickup remains optional.

sources.title: KTM ETS route search: KL Sentral to Ipoh
EasyBook coach route: KL Sentral to Ipoh

stops.name: Kedai Makanan Nam Heong 南香茶餐室
stops.summary: Begin Day 1 with the exact breakfast stop named in the post before moving into the Taman Jubilee specialty-food cluster.

image_attributions.label: Source image by 小霈霈奇遇记

stops.name: 新街场 · Taman Jubilee specialty-food street
stops.summary: The post names a general local-specialty street rather than one venue. Its images clearly show adjacent Guan Heong Biscuit Shop and TL Wine, so Jalan2 keeps this as an area cluster instead of inventing a coffee-shop match.
stops.address: Jalan Sultan Iskandar, Taman Jubilee, 30000 Ipoh, Perak

image_attributions.label: Source image by 小霈霈奇遇记

stops.name: Lost World of Tambun Night Park
stops.summary: Visit the hot springs and Luminous Forest at night. The creator warns that the forest is dark, has many stairs, and becomes a poor choice in rain; the distant new car park connects to the entrance by the park shuttle.
stops.address: 1, Persiaran Lagun Sunway 1, Sunway City, 31150 Ipoh, Perak

image_attributions.label: Source image by 小霈霈奇遇记

stops.name: Gopeng Glamping Park
stops.summary: Start Day 2 early at the grounded meeting base shown in the post. The creator describes a drive of a little over 30 minutes from the Airbnb; the accommodation address itself is not revealed.
stops.address: Lot 10846, Jalan Besar, Kampung Chulek, 31600 Gopeng, Perak

image_attributions.label: Source image by 小霈霈奇遇记

stops.name: Pre-booked Gopeng white-water rafting
stops.summary: The activity was booked before arrival, but the post never names the rafting operator or contact. It does show an operator lorry taking guests uphill from the Gopeng base, so Jalan2 requires operator identity, inclusions and safety details to be confirmed.
stops.address: Meeting base: Gopeng Glamping Park, Kampung Chulek, Gopeng

image_attributions.label: Source image by 小霈霈奇遇记

stops.name: Ming Yue Confectionery 明裕食品
stops.summary: Stop for the peanut candy shown after rafting. The next meal stop is directly opposite, so the source explicitly says to walk rather than drive.
stops.address: 50, Jalan Peh Kee Koh, Taman Kampar, 31650 Ipoh, Perak

image_attributions.label: Source image by 小霈霈奇遇记

stops.name: Big Tree Foot Enterprise 兵如港大树脚
stops.summary: Walk across from Ming Yue for the exact Big Tree Foot branch whose sign appears in the post. Google returns several similarly named places, so Jalan2 uses the image-confirmed Enterprise listing.
stops.address: 652, Jalan King, Taman Hoover, 31650 Ipoh, Perak

image_attributions.label: Source image by 小霈霈奇遇记

stops.name: Weng Kee Seafood Restaurant 永記海鮮飯店
stops.summary: Continue to the exact dinner restaurant named in the post. The available place result exposes only one service window, so dinner hours must be rechecked rather than assumed from incomplete opening data.
stops.address: 20, Tingkat Taman Ipoh 6, Garden South, 31400 Ipoh, Perak

image_attributions.label: Source image by 小霈霈奇遇记

stops.name: Kinta Riverwalk
stops.summary: Make the evening river stop shown in the source, but keep it optional: the creator found it quiet that night and left quickly.

image_attributions.label: Source image by 小霈霈奇遇记

stops.name: Foca Gelateria
stops.summary: Finish Day 2 with the gelato stop shown together with Kinta Riverwalk before returning to the same unnamed Airbnb.
stops.address: Lot 1729, Ipoh Stable Market, Jalan Raja Dihilir, 30350 Ipoh, Perak

image_attributions.label: Source image by 小霈霈奇遇记

stops.name: Foh San Restaurant 富山茶楼
stops.summary: Start Day 3 with the exact dim-sum breakfast named and pictured in the source before driving out of central Ipoh.
stops.address: 51, Jalan Leong Sin Nam, Kampung Jawa, 30300 Ipoh, Perak

image_attributions.label: Source image by 小霈霈奇遇记

stops.name: Kellie's Castle
stops.summary: Drive to the Day 3 heritage stop shown in the source. This clean scenic frame is used as the itinerary cover instead of the heavily overlaid social title card.
stops.address: KM 5.5, Jalan Gopeng, 31000 Batu Gajah, Perak

image_attributions.label: Source image by 小霈霈奇遇记

stops.name: HOGA, Gaharu Tea Valley Gopeng
stops.summary: Visit the family-friendly tea valley shown in the post, then use Grab or the optional bundled driver to reach the confirmed Ipoh rail or coach terminal for the trip home.

image_attributions.label: Source image by 小霈霈奇遇记

stops.name: Ipoh to Kuala Lumpur
stops.summary: Use Grab or the optional bundled driver to reach Ipoh Railway Station or Amanjaya after HOGA. Return to Kuala Lumpur by KTM ETS or an EasyBook coach; choose the actual departure only after the Day 3 timing is fixed.
stops.transport_mode: Driver drop-off + KTM ETS or EasyBook coach

EasyBook coach route: Ipoh to KL Sentral

warnings: Outbound and return KTM ETS or EasyBook departures are external searches: seats and fares must be selected for the actual dates.
Normal road legs expose destination-aware Grab handoffs. A three-day local driver remains optional for luggage, early pickups or lower-coverage Gopeng legs.
The rafting operator and Airbnb are not named in the source and must not be invented.
Opening intervals are incomplete provider snapshots; recheck dated and split-service hours before travel.

agents.label: End-to-end critic
agents.summary: The seeded journey closes the loop from Kuala Lumpur across three explicit days and back without forcing a driver or pretending any provider is already booked.
evidence: KL origin and return are explicit
Day boundaries are preserved
Grab and optional-driver choices are separated

legs.explanation: Open Grab from the confirmed Ipoh arrival terminal to Nam Heong; a pre-arranged driver is optional if carrying luggage.
Open Grab with the Taman Jubilee pin, or walk if the live route and luggage make that practical.
Grab reaches Lost World's car park; the park's own shuttle completes the entrance transfer.
This represents the next-morning pickup from the Ipoh stay to the Gopeng activity base, not a continuous overnight drive.
An uphill rafting lorry is source-observed, but the operator identity and exact pickup arrangement are not shown.
Try Grab back to Ipoh after rafting; keep the driver option because pickup coverage at the activity base can vary.
The caption explicitly says Big Tree Foot is opposite Ming Yue and reachable on foot.
Open Grab to Weng Kee after the short walking segment; a bundled driver remains optional.
Open Grab with the Kinta Riverwalk destination pin for this evening transfer.
Open Grab to Foca, then use Grab again for the return to the Ipoh stay.
This is the next-morning pickup from the same Ipoh stay to Foh San, not a direct overnight leg.
Open Grab to Kellie's Castle; compare availability against the optional driver before leaving central Ipoh.
Open Grab to HOGA, but retain the driver option because the two Gopeng-area pickups may have thinner supply.
Use Grab or the optional driver to reach the confirmed Ipoh terminal, then KTM ETS or an EasyBook coach returns the group to Kuala Lumpur.

checks.message: The seeded traveler starts and finishes in Kuala Lumpur across three explicit days.
checks.resolution: Choose outbound and return KTM ETS or EasyBook departures that leave enough time for the Day 3 terminal transfer.

checks.message: A hired driver is optional, not assumed.
checks.resolution: Use the destination-aware Grab links per leg; compare one driver quote only for luggage, early pickups or thinner Gopeng coverage.

checks.message: The rafting operator is unnamed even though the activity was pre-booked.
checks.resolution: Confirm operator identity, price, contact, safety terms, inclusions and the uphill lorry pickup.

checks.message: Lost World's Luminous Forest is dark, stair-heavy and weather-sensitive.
checks.resolution: Check rain, footwear and mobility needs; keep the hot springs as the fallback.

checks.message: Weng Kee's retrieved opening interval may omit dinner service.
checks.resolution: Recheck the exact date and split-service hours before locking the evening.

handoffs.label: Compare an optional three-day driver quote
handoffs.disclaimer: Grab remains available per displayed road leg. Only request one driver scope if luggage, early pickups or Gopeng coverage make it worthwhile; compare the total before payment.

handoffs.label: Confirm the pre-booked rafting operator
handoffs.disclaimer: The post does not identify the operator. Do not contact or pay an invented business.

handoffs.label: Find an Ipoh base if you are not using the source Airbnb
handoffs.disclaimer: The source Airbnb is unnamed. This is a general planner-added search, not the creator's listing.

critique.summary: The seeded trip is a coherent three-day Kuala Lumpur round trip without requiring the tourist to drive. Destination-aware Grab handoffs are the default road option; intercity inventory, an optional driver quote, accommodation and the unnamed rafting operator remain honestly separated.
